name: Paczki (Polish Doughnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream to lukewarm.
2. Add salt and whisk together the egg yolks in a large bowl until thick.
3. Cream butter and sugar, then add yeast dissolved with 1 tablespoon of sugar and mix thoroughly.
4. Alternate adding rum, then flour, and more cream, and beat hard until the dough blisters.
5. Place in a warm place to rise.
6. Punch down and let rise again.
7. Place on floured surface and roll out to desired thickness.
8. Fill with pitted prunes.
9. Fold over and cut into balls.
10. Place on floured surface and let rise.
11. Fry in deep hot oil, turning once until very dark brown.
12. Drain on paper towels.
13. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
